---
title: "Permanovas"
author: "CPJ"
date: "2026-04-09"
output: html_document
---

This script will produce the Permanova results for the manuscript "Peatlands Control Aquatic Carbon Pools and Fluxes in an Arctic Subcatchment".
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Setup
```{r Setup}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(colorblindcheck)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)
library(readr)
library(patchwork)
library(tools)
library(tidyr)
library(caret)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(ggrepel)
library(pairwiseAdonis)
library(flextable)

####Import Data Frames####
avg_site_all <- read_csv("avg_site_all.csv")
ft_site_all <- read_csv("ft_site_all.csv")
avg_site_surf <- read_csv("avg_site_surf.csv")
```

# NMDS

```{r NMDS}
##create matrix 
# --- Prepare site matrix ---
site <- ft_site_all %>%
  dplyr::select(Plot, Sample_Type, Aquatic_Type, Landcover, MolecularFormula, NormIntensity)

site_unique <- site %>%
  group_by(Plot, Sample_Type, Aquatic_Type, Landcover, MolecularFormula) %>%
  summarise(NormIntensity = sum(NormIntensity), .groups = "drop")

site_matrix <- site_unique %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = MolecularFormula,
    values_from = NormIntensity,
    values_fill = list(NormIntensity = 0)
  )

# --- Make matrix for NMDS ---
site_matrix_mat <- site_matrix %>%
  dplyr::select(-Plot, -Sample_Type, -Aquatic_Type, -Landcover) %>%
  as.matrix()

rownames(site_matrix_mat) <- paste(
  site_matrix$Plot,
  site_matrix$Sample_Type,
  site_matrix$Aquatic_Type,
  site_matrix$Landcover,
  sep = "_"
)

# --- Run NMDS ---
set.seed(42)
nmds <- metaMDS(site_matrix_mat, distance = "bray", k = 2, trymax = 100)
stress_val <- round(nmds$stress, 3)

# --- Prepare metadata ---
meta_clean <- ft_site_all %>%
  select(Plot, Sample_Type, Aquatic_Type, Landcover) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(SiteID = paste(Plot, Sample_Type, Aquatic_Type, Landcover, sep = "_"))

# --- NMDS scores with metadata ---
scores_df <- data.frame(nmds$points) %>%
  mutate(SiteID = rownames(.)) %>%
  left_join(meta_clean, by = "SiteID") %>%
  rename(NMDS1 = MDS1, NMDS2 = MDS2)

# --- Environmental matrix ---
# select your chemical/biochemical variables from avg_site_all
env_matrix <- avg_site_all %>%
  dplyr::select(Plot, Sample_Type, Aquatic_Type, Landcover,
                Lignin, Tannin, Unsat_HC, `Cond_HC`, `Amino_sugar`,
                Carbohydrate, Protein, Lipid, NOSC_mean, Shannon_Diversity, Raos_Elemental_Comp) %>%
  mutate(SiteID = paste(Plot, Sample_Type, Aquatic_Type, Landcover, sep = "_")) %>%
  filter(SiteID %in% rownames(site_matrix_mat)) %>%
  arrange(factor(SiteID, levels = rownames(site_matrix_mat))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Plot, -Sample_Type, -Aquatic_Type, -Landcover, -SiteID) %>%
  na.omit()

# --- Fit envfit ---
fit <- envfit(nmds, env_matrix, permutations = 999)

env_vectors <- as.data.frame(scores(fit, display = "vectors"))
env_vectors$pval <- fit$vectors$pvals
env_vectors$Variable <- rownames(env_vectors)
env_vectors$R2 <- fit$vectors$r

# Filter only significant vectors
env_vectors_sig <- env_vectors %>%
  filter(pval <= 0.05) %>%
  rename(MDS1 = NMDS1, MDS2 = NMDS2)

# --- Scale arrows to NMDS space ---
max_site_score <- max(sqrt(scores_df$NMDS1^2 + scores_df$NMDS2^2))
max_arrow <- max(sqrt(env_vectors_sig$MDS1^2 + env_vectors_sig$MDS2^2))
scale_factor <- 0.8 * max_site_score / max_arrow

env_vectors_sig_scaled <- env_vectors_sig %>%
  mutate(MDS1 = MDS1 * scale_factor,
         MDS2 = MDS2 * scale_factor)

saveRDS(nmds, "nmds_model.rds")
saveRDS(scores_df, "nmds_scores_df.rds")
saveRDS(env_vectors_sig_scaled, "nmds_env_vectors_scaled.rds")
saveRDS(stress_val, "nmds_stress.rds")
```

# Permanovas

```{r Data}
set.seed(456)

meta_clean_ordered <- meta_clean %>%
  filter(SiteID %in% rownames(site_matrix_mat)) %>%
  arrange(match(SiteID, rownames(site_matrix_mat)))

meta_pw <- meta_clean_ordered %>%
  #filter(!(Aquatic_Type == "Lake" & Landcover == "Tundra")) %>%
  mutate(
    Landcover_surface = ifelse(
      Aquatic_Type == "Porewater",
      paste("Porewater", Landcover, sep = "_"),
      paste(Aquatic_Type, Landcover, sep = "_")
    )
  )

site_matrix_pw <- site_matrix_mat[rownames(site_matrix_mat) %in% meta_pw$SiteID, ]
dist_mat_pw_full <- as.matrix(vegdist(site_matrix_pw, method = "bray"))

```

## All Surface vs All Porewater

```{r All surface vs Poreater}
meta_all <- meta_clean_ordered %>%
  #filter(!(Aquatic_Type == "Lake" & Landcover == "Tundra")) %>%
  filter(Sample_Type %in% c("surface", "porewater")) %>%
  filter(SiteID %in% rownames(site_matrix_mat)) %>%
  arrange(match(SiteID, rownames(site_matrix_mat)))

site_matrix_all <- site_matrix_mat[meta_all$SiteID, ]

dist_all <- vegdist(site_matrix_all, method = "bray")

adon_all <- adonis2(
  dist_all ~ Sample_Type,
  data = meta_all,
  permutations = 999
)

r2_all_df <- data.frame(
  Group = "Surface vs Porewater",
  F_stat = adon_all$F[1],
  R2 = adon_all$R2[1],
  p_value = adon_all$`Pr(>F)`[1]
)



r2_all_df

```


## Landcover Surface vs Landcover Porewater
```{r}
meta_clean_ordered <- meta_clean %>%
  filter(SiteID %in% rownames(site_matrix_mat)) %>%
  arrange(match(SiteID, rownames(site_matrix_mat)))

# =========================
# PERMANOVA: Surface vs Porewater
# within Aquatic_Type × Landcover
# =========================
meta_pw_clean <- meta_clean_ordered %>%
  mutate(
    Sample_Type = tolower(Sample_Type)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Plot) %>%
  mutate(
    Aquatic_Type_pair = first(Aquatic_Type[Sample_Type != "porewater"])
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    System = paste(Aquatic_Type_pair, Landcover, sep = "_")
  ) %>%
  filter(Sample_Type %in% c("surface", "porewater")) %>%
  filter(SiteID %in% rownames(site_matrix_mat))

# =========================
# 2. Keep only valid paired systems
# =========================

valid_systems <- meta_pw_clean %>%
  count(System, Sample_Type) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Sample_Type,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  filter(surface > 0 & porewater > 0) %>%
  pull(System)

meta_pw_clean <- meta_pw_clean %>%
  filter(System %in% valid_systems)

# =========================
# 3. Align community matrix
# =========================

site_sub <- site_matrix_mat[meta_pw_clean$SiteID, ]
dist_pw <- vegdist(site_sub, method = "bray")
dist_mat <- as.matrix(dist_pw)

# =========================
# 4. PERMANOVA per system
# =========================

systems <- unique(meta_pw_clean$System)

results <- lapply(systems, function(sys){

  sel <- meta_pw_clean$System == sys

  ad <- adonis2(
    dist_mat[sel, sel] ~ meta_pw_clean$Sample_Type[sel],
    permutations = 999
  )

  data.frame(
    System = sys,
    Aquatic_Type = unique(meta_pw_clean$Aquatic_Type_pair[sel]),
    Landcover = unique(meta_pw_clean$Landcover[sel]),
    F = ad$F[1],
    R2 = ad$R2[1],
    p = ad$`Pr(>F)`[1]
  )
})

r2_pw_df <- bind_rows(results)

# =========================
# 5. Adjust p-values
# =========================

r2_pw_df$p_adj <- p.adjust(r2_pw_df$p, method = "BH")

r2_pw_df

```


## Landcover vs Aquatic Type
```{r}
# Filter out Porewater and Lake-Tundra
meta_surface <- meta_clean_ordered %>%
  filter(Aquatic_Type != "Porewater") %>%
  filter(!(Aquatic_Type == "Lake" & Landcover == "Tundra"))

# Subset site matrix to match metadata
site_matrix_surface <- site_matrix_mat[rownames(site_matrix_mat) %in% meta_surface$SiteID, ]

# Bray-Curtis distance
dist_surface <- vegdist(site_matrix_surface, method = "bray")

# Run PERMANOVA
adon_land <- adonis2(dist_surface ~ Landcover * Aquatic_Type,
                             data = meta_surface,
                             permutations = 999,
                     by = "terms")

adon_land
r2_df <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Landcover", "Aquatic Type"),
  F_stat = c(
    adon_land["Landcover", "F"],
    adon_land["Aquatic_Type", "F"]
  ),
  R2 = c(
    adon_land["Landcover", "R2"],
    adon_land["Aquatic_Type", "R2"]
  ),
  p_value = c(
    adon_land["Landcover", "Pr(>F)"],
    adon_land["Aquatic_Type", "Pr(>F)"]
  )
)
r2_df
```


## add sigs and save dataframes for plotting
```{r save}
####add significant for plotting ####
get_stars <- function(p) {
  ifelse(p <= 0.001, "***",
  ifelse(p <= 0.01, "**",
  ifelse(p <= 0.05, "*", " ")))
}

r2_pw_df <- r2_pw_df %>%
  mutate(
    System = gsub("_", " ", System),
    Signif = get_stars(p)
  )
r2_pw_df
write.csv(r2_pw_df, "porewater_perm.csv", row.names = FALSE)

r2_df <- r2_df %>%
  mutate(
    Model = gsub("_", " ", Model),
    Signif = get_stars(p_value)
  )
r2_df
write.csv(r2_df, "all_perm.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
